items.title: Welcome to Cloud De-Coder
items.text: Here you will find a wealth of resources, tutorials, and best practices to help you master the art of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Azure Bicep and Terraform. Whether you're a beginner looking to get started or an experienced practitioner seeking advanced techniques, this site has something for everyone.

items.title: What You'll Learn
items.text:
• Azure

    Deep dive into Azure's cloud platform, learning how to design Azure infrastructure and clarify concepts on Azure services.

    Get started with Azure

  • Azure Bicep

    Learn Azure's native Infrastructure as Code language with domain-specific syntax designed for Azure deployments.

    Get started with Bicep

  • Terraform

    Master HashiCorp's multi-cloud IaC tool with HCL syntax for managing infrastructure across any cloud provider.

    Get started with Terraform

Coming Soon!

Will add more contents and Topics in the future. So Stay tuned!

items.title: About Me
items.text: Hi, I'm Rushikesh Deshmukh - a cloud infrastructure enthusiast passionate about Infrastructure as Code and DevOps practices.

items.title: What I Do
items.text:
• 🏗️ Design and implement cloud infrastructure solutions
  • 📝 Write about Bicep, Terraform, and Azure best practices
  • 🔄 Build CI/CD pipelines for infrastructure deployments
  • 🎯 Help teams adopt Infrastructure as Code practices

items.title: About This Site
items.text:
This site serves as a knowledge hub for Infrastructure as Code practitioners. Here you'll find:

  • Tutorials: Step-by-step guides for Bicep and Terraform
  • Best Practices: Industry-standard practices for IaC
  • Examples: Real-world code examples and templates
  • Comparisons: Objective comparisons to help you choose the right tool

items.title: Connect With Me
items.text:
• GitHub

    Check out my projects and contributions

    @rushideshmukh-tech

  • LinkedIn

    Connect with me professionally

    LinkedIn Profile

Philosophy

"Infrastructure as Code is not just about automation - it's about treating your infrastructure with the same care and discipline as your application code."

items.title: Azure
items.text: Clerify Azure and its services navigation and getting started guides here. This section serves as a comprehensive resource for all things Azure, providing you with the knowledge and tools you need to effectively utilize Azure services in your projects. Whether you're new to Azure or looking to deepen your understanding, you'll find valuable insights and practical guidance to help you succeed in your Azure journey.
